name: BioPharma Dive

name: STAT News
notes: Investigative and market-moving biotech/pharma coverage; filter for biotech category.

name: BioSpace
notes: Biotech, pharma, clinical research news and industry trends.

notes: Europe's leading biotech news site — funding rounds, R&D, policy.

notes: Pan-Asia biopharma, medtech, diagnostics coverage with country category pages.

notes: India-specific biopharma, biotech and healthcare news.

name: Nikkei Asia — Biotechnology
notes: Japan/Asia biotech business and policy coverage (verify feed availability, may require scraping).

name: Nature Biotechnology — News
notes: Research-adjacent news and comment, high credibility scientific source.
